name: Saskatchewan Teacher — Educator Credit and Graduate Retention
description: Complete Clara Vogt's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Use the tax documents and scenario details located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\vogt\. The return must include all T4 income, the Eligible Educator School Supply Tax Credit, Student Loan Interest, and the Saskatchewan Graduate Retention Program (RC360) for a 2023 graduate. Save the completed return as 'clara_vogt.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4001 (Educator Credit); SK RC360 guidelines
metadata.key_complexity: Three separate T4s causing statutory overpayment; Line 31217 Educator credit; Line 31900 Student loan interest; Form RC360 Saskatchewan Graduate Retention Program
